title: Fix Azure Kubernetes image interpolation for ACR pulls
description: Correct the Kubernetes image reference in terraform/kubernetes.tf so Azure container images resolve correctly from ACR instead of using a literal string.
acceptanceCriteria: Terraform uses HCL interpolation for the image name in the Kubernetes deployment manifests
The Azure deployment path renders the expected image reference pattern for each service
The change is documented in the Azure implementation notes
notes: The researcher findings flagged a literal "{each.key}" image reference bug.
This work should be completed in an Azure feature branch and documented for later AWS reuse.
